17	#include "src/fastertransformer/kernels/layernorm_int8_kernels.h"
18	#include "src/fastertransformer/kernels/reduce_kernel_utils.cuh"
19	
20	namespace fastertransformer {
21	
22	// input1/input2/output matrix with layout of cublasLt CUBLASLT_ORDER_COL32 (m*n)
23	//(grid, block) must be (m, n)
24	// for per_channel_quantization for weight
25	__global__ void add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int32I_DataTypeO(float*         output,
26	                                                                const int32_t* input1,
27	                                                                const float*   input2,
28	                                                                const float*   bias,
29	                                                                const float*   gamma,
30	                                                                const float*   beta,
31	                                                                int            m,
32	                                                                int            n,
33	                                                                const float*   weight_amax,
34	                                                                const float*   input1_amax_ptr)
35	{
36	    const float input1_amax = __ldg(input1_amax_ptr);
37	    int         col_start   = threadIdx.x;
38	
39	    __shared__ float s_mean;
40	    __shared__ float s_variance;
41	    float            mean     = 0.0f;
42	    float            variance = 0.0f;
43	
44	    float local_out;
45	    int   outIdx = ((col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_start & 31));
46	
47	    float tmp = static_cast<float>(__ldg(input1 + outIdx)) * __ldg(weight_amax + col_start) * input1_amax
48	                * 0.000062f;  //(1/127/127);
49	    float inputTmp = __ldg(input2 + outIdx);
50	
51	    local_out = tmp + inputTmp + __ldg(bias + col_start);
52	
53	    mean = blockReduceSum<float>(local_out);
54	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
55	        s_mean = __fdividef(mean, n);
56	    }
57	    __syncthreads();
58	
59	    local_out = local_out - s_mean;
60	
61	    variance = blockReduceSum<float>(local_out * local_out);
62	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
63	        s_variance = __fdividef(variance, n) + 1e-6f;
64	        s_variance = rsqrtf(s_variance);
65	    }
66	    __syncthreads();
67	
68	    local_out = (local_out * s_variance) * __ldg(gamma + col_start) + __ldg(beta + col_start);
69	
70	    output[outIdx] = local_out;
71	}
72	
73	__global__ void add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int32I_DataTypeO(half2*        output,
74	                                                                const int2*   input1,
75	                                                                const half2*  input2,
76	                                                                const half2*  bias,
77	                                                                const half2*  gamma,
78	                                                                const half2*  beta,
79	                                                                int           m,
80	                                                                int           n,
81	                                                                const float2* weight_amax,
82	                                                                const float*  input1_amax_ptr)
83	{
84	    int col_start = threadIdx.x << 1;
85	
86	    const float input1_amax = __ldg(input1_amax_ptr);
87	
88	    __shared__ float s_mean;
89	    __shared__ float s_variance;
90	    float            mean     = 0.0f;
91	    float            variance = 0.0f;
92	
93	    float2 local_out;
94	    int    outIdx = ((col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_start & 31)) >> 1;
95	
96	    const int2   input1Tmp = __ldg(input1 + outIdx);
97	    const float2 weightTmp = __ldg(weight_amax + threadIdx.x);
98	
99	    float2 addTmp2;
100	    addTmp2.x = static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.x) * weightTmp.x * input1_amax * 0.000062f;  //(1/127/127);
101	    addTmp2.y = static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.y) * weightTmp.y * input1_amax * 0.000062f;  //(1/127/127);
102	
103	    const half2 inputTmp = __ldg(input2 + outIdx);
104	    const half2 biasTmp  = __ldg(bias + threadIdx.x);
105	
106	    local_out   = __half22float2(__hadd2(inputTmp, biasTmp));
107	    local_out.x = local_out.x + addTmp2.x;
108	    local_out.y = local_out.y + addTmp2.y;
109	
110	    mean = blockReduceSum<float>(local_out.x + local_out.y);
111	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
112	        s_mean = __fdividef(mean, n);
113	    }
114	    __syncthreads();
115	
116	    local_out.x = local_out.x - s_mean;
117	    local_out.y = local_out.y - s_mean;
118	
119	    variance = blockReduceSum<float>(local_out.x * local_out.x + local_out.y * local_out.y);
120	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
121	        s_variance = __fdividef(variance, n) + 1e-6f;
122	        s_variance = rsqrtf(s_variance);
123	    }
124	    __syncthreads();
125	
126	    float2      outputTmp;
127	    const half2 gammaTmp = __ldg(gamma + threadIdx.x);
128	    const half2 betaTmp  = __ldg(beta + threadIdx.x);
129	
130	    outputTmp.x = (local_out.x * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(gammaTmp.x) + static_cast<float>(betaTmp.x);
131	    outputTmp.y = (local_out.y * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(gammaTmp.y) + static_cast<float>(betaTmp.y);
132	
133	    output[outIdx] = __float22half2_rn(outputTmp);
134	}
135	
136	template<typename T>
137	void invokeAddBiasResidualLayerNormCol32(T*             output,
138	                                         const int32_t* input1,
139	                                         const T*       input2,
140	                                         const T*       bias,
141	                                         const T*       gamma,
142	                                         const T*       beta,
143	                                         int            m,
144	                                         int            n,
145	                                         cudaStream_t   stream,
146	                                         const float*   weight_amax,
147	                                         const float*   input1_amax_ptr)
148	{
149	
150	    dim3 grid(m);
151	    dim3 block(n);
152	    if (sizeof(T) == sizeof(half)) {
153	        block.x /= 2;
154	        assert(block.x <= 1024);
155	        add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int32I_DataTypeO<<<grid, block, 0, stream>>>((half2*)output,
156	                                                                                    (const int2*)input1,
157	                                                                                    (const half2*)input2,
158	                                                                                    (const half2*)bias,
159	                                                                                    (const half2*)gamma,
160	                                                                                    (const half2*)beta,
161	                                                                                    m,
162	                                                                                    n,
163	                                                                                    (const float2*)weight_amax,
164	                                                                                    input1_amax_ptr);
165	    }
166	    else {
167	        assert(block.x <= 1024);
168	        add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int32I_DataTypeO<<<grid, block, 0, stream>>>((float*)output,
169	                                                                                    input1,
170	                                                                                    (const float*)input2,
171	                                                                                    (const float*)bias,
172	                                                                                    (const float*)gamma,
173	                                                                                    (const float*)beta,
174	                                                                                    m,
175	                                                                                    n,
176	                                                                                    weight_amax,
177	                                                                                    input1_amax_ptr);
178	    }
179	}
180	
181	template void invokeAddBiasResidualLayerNormCol32(float*         output,
182	                                                  const int32_t* input1,
183	                                                  const float*   input2,
184	                                                  const float*   bias,
185	                                                  const float*   gamma,
186	                                                  const float*   beta,
187	                                                  int            m,
188	                                                  int            n,
189	                                                  cudaStream_t   stream,
190	                                                  const float*   weight_amax,
191	                                                  const float*   input1_amax_ptr);
192	template void invokeAddBiasResidualLayerNormCol32(half*          output,
193	                                                  const int32_t* input1,
194	                                                  const half*    input2,
195	                                                  const half*    bias,
196	                                                  const half*    gamma,
197	                                                  const half*    beta,
198	                                                  int            m,
199	                                                  int            n,
200	                                                  cudaStream_t   stream,
201	                                                  const float*   weight_amax,
202	                                                  const float*   input1_amax_ptr);
203	
204	// input1/input2/out matrix with layout of cublasLt CUBLASLT_ORDER_COL32 (m*n)
205	//(grid, block) must be (m, n/4)
206	// using char4
207	template<typename T>
208	__global__ void add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int8IO(int8_t*       output,
209	                                                      const int8_t* input1,
210	                                                      const int8_t* input2,
211	                                                      const T*      bias,
212	                                                      const T*      gamma,
213	                                                      const T*      beta,
214	                                                      int           m,
215	                                                      int           n,
216	                                                      const float*  input1_deQFactor_ptr,
217	                                                      const float*  input2_deQFactor_ptr,
218	                                                      const float*  output_scale_ptr)
219	{
220	    const float input1_deQFactor = __ldg(input1_deQFactor_ptr);
221	    const float input2_deQFactor = __ldg(input2_deQFactor_ptr);
222	    const float output_scale     = __ldg(output_scale_ptr);
223	    int         col_start        = threadIdx.x << 2;
224	
225	    __shared__ float s_mean;
226	    __shared__ float s_variance;
227	    float            mean     = 0.0f;
228	    float            variance = 0.0f;
229	
230	    float  local_out[4];
231	    int    outIdx       = ((col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_start & 31)) >> 2;
232	    char4* outTmpPtr    = (char4*)output;
233	    char4* input1TmpPtr = (char4*)input1;
234	    char4* input2TmpPtr = (char4*)input2;
235	    char4  input1Tmp    = __ldg(input1TmpPtr + outIdx);
236	    char4  input2Tmp    = __ldg(input2TmpPtr + outIdx);
237	
238	    int col_start_tmp = col_start;
239	    local_out[0]      = static_cast<float>(input2Tmp.x) * input2_deQFactor
240	                   + static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.x) * input1_deQFactor
241	                   + static_cast<float>(__ldg(bias + col_start_tmp));
242	    col_start_tmp = col_start_tmp + 1;
243	    local_out[1]  = static_cast<float>(input2Tmp.y) * input2_deQFactor
244	                   + static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.y) * input1_deQFactor
245	                   + static_cast<float>(__ldg(bias + col_start_tmp));
246	    col_start_tmp = col_start_tmp + 1;
247	    local_out[2]  = static_cast<float>(input2Tmp.z) * input2_deQFactor
248	                   + static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.z) * input1_deQFactor
249	                   + static_cast<float>(__ldg(bias + col_start_tmp));
250	    col_start_tmp = col_start_tmp + 1;
251	    local_out[3]  = static_cast<float>(input2Tmp.w) * input2_deQFactor
252	                   + static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.w) * input1_deQFactor
253	                   + static_cast<float>(__ldg(bias + col_start_tmp));
254	
255	    mean = blockReduceSum<float>(local_out[0] + local_out[1] + local_out[2] + local_out[3]);
256	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
257	        s_mean = mean * __fdividef(1.0f, n);
258	    }
259	    __syncthreads();
260	
261	    local_out[0] = local_out[0] - s_mean;
262	    local_out[1] = local_out[1] - s_mean;
263	    local_out[2] = local_out[2] - s_mean;
264	    local_out[3] = local_out[3] - s_mean;
265	    variance     = blockReduceSum<float>(local_out[0] * local_out[0] + local_out[1] * local_out[1]
266	                                     + local_out[2] * local_out[2] + local_out[3] * local_out[3]);
267	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
268	        s_variance = variance * __fdividef(1.0f, n) + 1e-6f;
269	        s_variance = rsqrtf(s_variance);
270	    }
271	    __syncthreads();
272	
273	    local_out[0] = (local_out[0] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
274	                   + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
275	    input2Tmp.x = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[0] * output_scale);
276	
277	    col_start    = col_start + 1;
278	    local_out[1] = (local_out[1] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
279	                   + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
280	    input2Tmp.y = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[1] * output_scale);
281	
282	    col_start    = col_start + 1;
283	    local_out[2] = (local_out[2] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
284	                   + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
285	    input2Tmp.z = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[2] * output_scale);
286	
287	    col_start    = col_start + 1;
288	    local_out[3] = (local_out[3] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
289	                   + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
290	    input2Tmp.w = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[3] * output_scale);
291	
292	    outTmpPtr[outIdx] = input2Tmp;
293	}
294	
295	template<>
296	__global__ void add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int8IO(int8_t*       output,
297	                                                      const int8_t* input1,
298	                                                      const int8_t* input2,
299	                                                      const half2*  bias,
300	                                                      const half2*  gamma,
301	                                                      const half2*  beta,
302	                                                      int           m,
303	                                                      int           n,
304	                                                      const float*  input1_deQFactor_ptr,
305	                                                      const float*  input2_deQFactor_ptr,
306	                                                      const float*  output_scale_ptr)
307	{
308	    const float input1_deQFactor = __ldg(input1_deQFactor_ptr);
309	    const float input2_deQFactor = __ldg(input2_deQFactor_ptr);
310	    const float output_scale     = __ldg(output_scale_ptr);
311	    int         col_start        = threadIdx.x << 2;
312	
313	    __shared__ float s_mean;
314	    __shared__ float s_variance;
315	    float            mean     = 0.0f;
316	    float            variance = 0.0f;
317	
318	    float  local_out[4];
319	    int    outIdx       = ((col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_start & 31)) >> 2;
320	    char4* outTmpPtr    = (char4*)output;
321	    char4* input1TmpPtr = (char4*)input1;
322	    char4* input2TmpPtr = (char4*)input2;
323	    char4  input1Tmp    = __ldg(input1TmpPtr + outIdx);
324	    char4  input2Tmp    = __ldg(input2TmpPtr + outIdx);
325	
326	    int   col_start_tmp = col_start;
327	    half2 biasTmp       = __ldg(bias + (col_start_tmp >> 1));
328	    local_out[0]        = static_cast<float>(input2Tmp.x) * input2_deQFactor
329	                   + static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.x) * input1_deQFactor + static_cast<float>(biasTmp.x);
330	    col_start_tmp = col_start_tmp + 1;
331	    local_out[1]  = static_cast<float>(input2Tmp.y) * input2_deQFactor
332	                   + static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.y) * input1_deQFactor + static_cast<float>(biasTmp.y);
333	
334	    col_start_tmp = col_start_tmp + 1;
335	    biasTmp       = __ldg(bias + (col_start_tmp >> 1));
336	    local_out[2]  = static_cast<float>(input2Tmp.z) * input2_deQFactor
337	                   + static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.z) * input1_deQFactor + static_cast<float>(biasTmp.x);
338	    col_start_tmp = col_start_tmp + 1;
339	    local_out[3]  = static_cast<float>(input2Tmp.w) * input2_deQFactor
340	                   + static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.w) * input1_deQFactor + static_cast<float>(biasTmp.y);
341	
342	    mean = blockReduceSum<float>(local_out[0] + local_out[1] + local_out[2] + local_out[3]);
343	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
344	        s_mean = mean * __fdividef(1.0f, n);
345	    }
346	    __syncthreads();
347	
348	    local_out[0] = local_out[0] - s_mean;
349	    local_out[1] = local_out[1] - s_mean;
350	    local_out[2] = local_out[2] - s_mean;
351	    local_out[3] = local_out[3] - s_mean;
352	    variance     = blockReduceSum<float>(local_out[0] * local_out[0] + local_out[1] * local_out[1]
353	                                     + local_out[2] * local_out[2] + local_out[3] * local_out[3]);
354	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
355	        s_variance = variance * __fdividef(1.0f, n) + 1e-6f;
356	        s_variance = rsqrtf(s_variance);
357	    }
358	    __syncthreads();
359	
360	    col_start_tmp = col_start >> 1;
361	    biasTmp       = __ldg(gamma + col_start_tmp);
362	    half2 betaTmp = __ldg(beta + col_start_tmp);
363	
364	    local_out[0] = (local_out[0] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(biasTmp.x) + static_cast<float>(betaTmp.x);
365	    input2Tmp.x  = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[0] * output_scale);
366	
367	    col_start    = col_start + 1;
368	    local_out[1] = (local_out[1] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(biasTmp.y) + static_cast<float>(betaTmp.y);
369	    input2Tmp.y  = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[1] * output_scale);
370	
371	    col_start     = col_start + 1;
372	    col_start_tmp = col_start >> 1;
373	    biasTmp       = __ldg(gamma + col_start_tmp);
374	    betaTmp       = __ldg(beta + col_start_tmp);
375	    local_out[2]  = (local_out[2] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(biasTmp.x) + static_cast<float>(betaTmp.x);
376	    input2Tmp.z   = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[2] * output_scale);
377	
378	    col_start    = col_start + 1;
379	    local_out[3] = (local_out[3] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(biasTmp.y) + static_cast<float>(betaTmp.y);
380	    input2Tmp.w  = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[3] * output_scale);
381	
382	    outTmpPtr[outIdx] = input2Tmp;
383	}

443	template void invokeAddBiasResidualLayerNormCol32(int8_t*       output,
444	                                                  const int8_t* input1,
445	                                                  const int8_t* input2,
446	                                                  const half*   bias,
447	                                                  const half*   gamma,
448	                                                  const half*   beta,
449	                                                  int           m,
450	                                                  int           n,
451	                                                  cudaStream_t  stream,
452	                                                  const float*  input1_deQFactor_ptr,
453	                                                  const float*  input2_deQFactor_ptr,
454	                                                  const float*  output_scale_ptr);

456	// input1/input2/out matrix with layout of cublasLt CUBLASLT_ORDER_COL32 (m*n)
457	//(grid, block) must be (m, n)
458	template<typename T>
459	__global__ void add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int8I_DataTypeO(T*            output,
460	                                                               const int8_t* input1,
461	                                                               const int8_t* input2,
462	                                                               const T*      bias,
463	                                                               const T*      gamma,
464	                                                               const T*      beta,
465	                                                               int           m,
466	                                                               int           n,
467	                                                               const float*  input1_deQFactor_ptr,
468	                                                               const float*  input2_deQFactor_ptr)
469	{
470	    const float input1_deQFactor = __ldg(input1_deQFactor_ptr);
471	    const float input2_deQFactor = __ldg(input2_deQFactor_ptr);
472	    int         col_start        = threadIdx.x;
473	
474	    __shared__ float s_mean;
475	    __shared__ float s_variance;
476	    float            mean     = 0.0f;
477	    float            variance = 0.0f;
478	
479	    float local_out;
480	    int   idx = ((col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_start & 31));
481	
482	    local_out = static_cast<float>(__ldg(input2 + idx)) * input2_deQFactor
483	                + static_cast<float>(__ldg(input1 + idx)) * input1_deQFactor
484	                + static_cast<float>(__ldg(bias + col_start));
485	
486	    mean = blockReduceSum<float>(local_out);
487	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
488	        s_mean = mean * __fdividef(1.0f, n);
489	    }
490	    __syncthreads();
491	
492	    local_out = local_out - s_mean;
493	
494	    variance = blockReduceSum<float>(local_out * local_out);
495	
496	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
497	        s_variance = variance * __fdividef(1.0f, n) + 1e-6f;
498	        s_variance = rsqrtf(s_variance);
499	    }
500	    __syncthreads();
501	
502	    local_out = (local_out * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
503	                + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
504	
505	    output[idx] = local_out;
506	}
507	
508	// input1/input2/out matrix with layout of cublasLt CUBLASLT_ORDER_COL32 (m*n)
509	//(grid, block) must be (m, n/2)
510	template<>
511	__global__ void add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int8I_DataTypeO(half2*        output,
512	                                                               const int8_t* input1,
513	                                                               const int8_t* input2,
514	                                                               const half2*  bias,
515	                                                               const half2*  gamma,
516	                                                               const half2*  beta,
517	                                                               int           m,
518	                                                               int           n,
519	                                                               const float*  input1_deQFactor_ptr,
520	                                                               const float*  input2_deQFactor_ptr)
521	{
522	    const float input1_deQFactor = __ldg(input1_deQFactor_ptr);
523	    const float input2_deQFactor = __ldg(input2_deQFactor_ptr);
524	    int         col_start        = threadIdx.x << 1;
525	
526	    __shared__ float s_mean;
527	    __shared__ float s_variance;
528	    float            mean     = 0.0f;
529	    float            variance = 0.0f;
530	
531	    float2 local_out;
532	    int    idx = ((col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_start & 31)) >> 1;
533	
534	    const char2* input1_ptr2 = (const char2*)input1;
535	    const char2* input2_ptr2 = (const char2*)input2;
536	    char2        input_tmp1  = __ldg(input1_ptr2 + idx);
537	    char2        input_tmp2  = __ldg(input2_ptr2 + idx);
538	
539	    half2 bias_tmp = __ldg(bias + threadIdx.x);
540	
541	    local_out.x = static_cast<float>(input_tmp1.x) * input1_deQFactor
542	                  + static_cast<float>(input_tmp2.x) * input2_deQFactor + static_cast<float>(bias_tmp.x);
543	
544	    local_out.y = static_cast<float>(input_tmp1.y) * input1_deQFactor
545	                  + static_cast<float>(input_tmp2.y) * input2_deQFactor + static_cast<float>(bias_tmp.y);
546	
547	    mean = blockReduceSum<float>(local_out.x + local_out.y);
548	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
549	        s_mean = mean * __fdividef(1.0f, n);
550	    }
551	    __syncthreads();
552	
553	    local_out.x = local_out.x - s_mean;
554	
555	    local_out.y = local_out.y - s_mean;
556	
557	    variance = blockReduceSum<float>(local_out.x * local_out.x + local_out.y * local_out.y);
558	
559	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
560	        s_variance = variance * __fdividef(1.0f, n) + 1e-6f;
561	        s_variance = rsqrtf(s_variance);
562	    }
563	    __syncthreads();
564	
565	    half2 gamma_tmp = __ldg(gamma + threadIdx.x);
566	    half2 beta_tmp  = __ldg(beta + threadIdx.x);
567	
568	    local_out.x = (local_out.x * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(gamma_tmp.x) + static_cast<float>(beta_tmp.x);
569	    local_out.y = (local_out.y * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(gamma_tmp.y) + static_cast<float>(beta_tmp.y);
570	
571	    bias_tmp.x = half(local_out.x);
572	    bias_tmp.y = half(local_out.y);
573	
574	    output[idx] = bias_tmp;
575	}

579	                                         const int8_t* input1,
580	                                         const int8_t* input2,

582	                                         const T*      gamma,

595	        add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int8I_DataTypeO<<<grid, block, 0, stream>>>((half2*)output,
596	                                                                                   input1,

598	                                                                                   (const half2*)bias,

600	                                                                                   (const half2*)beta,
601	                                                                                   m,
602	                                                                                   n,
603	                                                                                   input1_deQFactor_ptr,
604	                                                                                   input2_deQFactor_ptr);
605	    }
606	    else {
607	        assert(n <= 1024);
608	        add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int8I_DataTypeO<T><<<grid, block, 0, stream>>>(
609	            output, input1, input2, bias, gamma, beta, m, n, input1_deQFactor_ptr, input2_deQFactor_ptr);
610	    }
611	}

626	                                                        const int8_t* input1,
627	                                                        const int8_t* input2,
628	                                                        const half*   bias,
629	                                                        const half*   gamma,
630	                                                        const half*   beta,
631	                                                        int           m,

636	
637	/*******************  invokeAddBiasLayernormAddRes  ***********************/
638	template<typename T, int T_per_thread>
639	__global__ void add_bias_layernorm_add_res(int8_t*       out_int8,
640	                                           const int8_t* out,
641	                                           T*            residual_input,
642	                                           const T*      bias,
643	                                           const T*      gamma,
644	                                           const T*      beta,
645	                                           const float   layernorm_eps,
646	                                           int           m,
647	                                           int           n,
648	                                           const float*  input_deQFactor_ptr,
649	                                           const float*  out_QFactor_ptr)
650	{
651	    const float      input_deQFactor = __ldg(input_deQFactor_ptr);
652	    const float      out_QFactor     = out_QFactor_ptr == nullptr ? -1.0f : __ldg(out_QFactor_ptr);
653	    int              tid             = threadIdx.x;
654	    const int        bdim            = blockDim.x;
655	    __shared__ float s_mean;
656	    __shared__ float s_variance;
657	
658	    float local_val[T_per_thread];
659	
660	    // float sums[2] = {0.0f, 0.0f};
661	    float local_sum = 0.0f;
662	#pragma unroll
663	    for (int i = 0; i < T_per_thread; i++) {
664	        int col_start = i * bdim + tid;
665	        if (col_start < n) {
666	            T bias_val = bias[col_start];
667	
668	            int inIdx    = (col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_start & 31);
669	            T   out_val  = static_cast<T>(out[inIdx]) * static_cast<T>(input_deQFactor);
670	            T   tmp      = out_val + bias_val;
671	            local_val[i] = tmp;
672	            local_sum += local_val[i];
673	        }
674	    }
675	
676	    blockReduceSum<float>(local_sum);
677	
678	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
679	        s_mean = local_sum * __fdividef(1.0f, n);
680	    }
681	    __syncthreads();
682	
683	    local_sum = 0.0f;
684	#pragma unroll
685	    for (int i = 0; i < T_per_thread; i++) {
686	        local_sum += (local_val[i] - s_mean) * (local_val[i] - s_mean);
687	    }
688	
689	    blockReduceSum<float>(local_sum);
690	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
691	        s_variance = rsqrtf(local_sum * __fdividef(1.0f, n) + layernorm_eps);
692	    }
693	    __syncthreads();
694	
695	#pragma unroll
696	    for (int i = 0; i < T_per_thread; i++) {
697	        int col_start = i * bdim + tid;
698	        if (col_start < n) {
699	            T gamma_val = gamma[col_start];
700	            T beta_val  = beta[col_start];
701	
702	            int   outIdx  = (col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_start & 31);
703	            T     res_val = residual_input[outIdx];
704	            float output_val =
705	                (local_val[i] - s_mean) * s_variance * (float)(gamma_val) + (float)(beta_val) + (float)(res_val);
706	
707	            if (out_QFactor_ptr != nullptr) {
708	                residual_input[outIdx] = (T)output_val;
709	                out_int8[outIdx]       = float_to_int8_rn(output_val * out_QFactor);
710	            }
711	            else {
712	                T* out_T_ptr      = reinterpret_cast<T*>(out_int8);
713	                out_T_ptr[outIdx] = (T)output_val;
714	            }
715	        }
716	    }
717	}
718	
719	template<int T_per_thread>
720	__global__ void add_bias_layernorm_add_res_e2(char2*       out_int8,
721	                                              const char2* out,
722	                                              half2*       residual_input,
723	                                              const half2* bias,
724	                                              const half2* gamma,
725	                                              const half2* beta,
726	                                              const float  layernorm_eps,
727	                                              int          m,
728	                                              int          n,
729	                                              const float* input_deQFactor_ptr,
730	                                              const float* out_QFactor_ptr)
731	{
732	    const float      input_deQFactor = __ldg(input_deQFactor_ptr);
733	    const float      out_QFactor     = out_QFactor_ptr == nullptr ? -1.0f : __ldg(out_QFactor_ptr);
734	    int              tid             = threadIdx.x;
735	    const int        bdim            = blockDim.x;
736	    __shared__ float s_mean;
737	    __shared__ float s_variance;
738	    const int        n_2 = n >> 1;
739	
740	    half2 local_val[T_per_thread];
741	
742	    float local_sum = 0.0f;
743	#pragma unroll
744	    for (int i = 0; i < T_per_thread; i++) {
745	        // int index = i * bdim + tid;
746	        int col_start = i * bdim + tid;
747	        if (col_start < n_2) {
748	            half2 bias_val = bias[col_start];
749	
750	            int   col_id = col_start << 1;
751	            int   inIdx  = ((col_id & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_id & 31)) >> 1;
752	            char2 outTmp = out[inIdx];
753	            half2 out_val;
754	            out_val.x = static_cast<half>(outTmp.x) * static_cast<half>(input_deQFactor);
755	            out_val.y = static_cast<half>(outTmp.y) * static_cast<half>(input_deQFactor);
756	
757	            half2 tmp         = __hadd2(out_val, bias_val);
758	            local_val[i]      = tmp;
759	            float2 tmp_float2 = __half22float2(tmp);
760	            local_sum += tmp_float2.x + tmp_float2.y;
761	        }
762	    }
763	
764	    local_sum = blockReduceSum<float>(local_sum);
765	
766	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
767	        s_mean = local_sum * __fdividef(1.0f, n);
768	    }
769	    __syncthreads();
770	
771	    local_sum = 0.0f;
772	#pragma unroll
773	    for (int i = 0; i < T_per_thread; i++) {
774	        int col_start = i * bdim + tid;
775	        if (col_start < n_2) {
776	            float2 tmp_float2 = __half22float2(local_val[i]);
777	            local_sum +=
778	                (tmp_float2.x - s_mean) * (tmp_float2.x - s_mean) + (tmp_float2.y - s_mean) * (tmp_float2.y - s_mean);
779	        }
780	    }
781	
782	    local_sum = blockReduceSum<float>(local_sum);
783	
784	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
785	        s_variance = rsqrtf(local_sum * __fdividef(1.0f, n) + layernorm_eps);
786	    }
787	    __syncthreads();
788	
789	#pragma unroll
790	    for (int i = 0; i < T_per_thread; i++) {
791	        int col_start = i * bdim + tid;
792	        if (col_start < n_2) {
793	            float2 gamma_val = __half22float2(gamma[col_start]);
794	            float2 beta_val  = __half22float2(beta[col_start]);
795	
796	            int    col_id  = col_start << 1;
797	            int    outIdx  = ((col_id & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_id & 31)) >> 1;
798	            float2 res_val = __half22float2(residual_input[outIdx]);
799	            float2 output_val;
800	            float2 tmp_float2 = __half22float2(local_val[i]);
801	            output_val.x      = (tmp_float2.x - s_mean) * s_variance * gamma_val.x + beta_val.x + res_val.x;
802	            output_val.y      = (tmp_float2.y - s_mean) * s_variance * gamma_val.y + beta_val.y + res_val.y;
803	            if (out_QFactor_ptr != nullptr) {
804	                residual_input[outIdx] = __float22half2_rn(output_val);
805	                char2 outTmp;
806	                outTmp.x         = float_to_int8_rn(output_val.x * out_QFactor);
807	                outTmp.y         = float_to_int8_rn(output_val.y * out_QFactor);
808	                out_int8[outIdx] = outTmp;
809	            }
810	            else {
811	                half2* out_ptr  = reinterpret_cast<half2*>(out_int8);
812	                out_ptr[outIdx] = __float22half2_rn(output_val);
813	            }
814	        }
815	    }
816	}

818	#define MACRO_ADD_BIAS_LN_ADD_RES(T_per_TVec)                                                                          \
819	    blockSize = (blockSize + TVec_per_thread - 1) / TVec_per_thread;                                                   \
820	    if (T_per_TVec == 2) {                                                                                             \
821	        if (std::is_same<T, half>::value) {                                                                            \
822	            add_bias_layernorm_add_res_e2<TVec_per_thread><<<m, blockSize, 0, stream>>>((char2*)out_int8,              \
823	                                                                                        (const char2*)out,             \
824	                                                                                        (half2*)residual_input,        \
825	                                                                                        (const half2*)bias,            \
826	                                                                                        (const half2*)gamma,           \
827	                                                                                        (const half2*)beta,            \
828	                                                                                        layernorm_eps,                 \
829	                                                                                        m,                             \
830	                                                                                        n,                             \
831	                                                                                        input_deQFactor_ptr,           \
832	                                                                                        out_QFactor_ptr);              \
833	        }                                                                                                              \
834	        else {                                                                                                         \
835	            FT_CHECK_WITH_INFO(false, "[invokeAddBiasLayernormAddRes] unsupported dataType.");                         \
836	        }                                                                                                              \
837	    }                                                                                                                  \
838	    else {                                                                                                             \
839	        if (std::is_same<T, half>::value) {                                                                            \
840	            add_bias_layernorm_add_res<half, TVec_per_thread><<<m, blockSize, 0, stream>>>((int8_t*)out_int8,          \
841	                                                                                           (const int8_t*)out,         \
842	                                                                                           (half*)residual_input,      \
843	                                                                                           (const half*)bias,          \
844	                                                                                           (const half*)gamma,         \
845	                                                                                           (const half*)beta,          \
846	                                                                                           layernorm_eps,              \
847	                                                                                           m,                          \
848	                                                                                           n,                          \
849	                                                                                           input_deQFactor_ptr,        \
850	                                                                                           out_QFactor_ptr);           \
851	        }                                                                                                              \
852	        else {                                                                                                         \
853	            FT_CHECK_WITH_INFO(false, "[invokeAddBiasLayernormAddRes] unsupported dataType.");                         \
854	        }                                                                                                              \
855	    }

857	template<typename T>
858	void invokeAddBiasLayernormAddResCol32(int8_t*      out_int8,
859	                                       int8_t*      out,
860	                                       T*           residual_input,
861	                                       const T*     bias,
862	                                       const T*     gamma,
863	                                       const T*     beta,
864	                                       const float  layernorm_eps,
865	                                       int          m,
866	                                       int          n,
867	                                       cudaStream_t stream,
868	                                       const float* input_deQFactor_ptr,
869	                                       const float* out_QFactor_ptr)
870	{
871	    if (n % 2 == 0) {
872	        const int T_per_TVec = 2;
873	        int       blockSize  = (n / 2 + 31) / 32 * 32;
874	        if (blockSize <= 1024) {
875	            const int TVec_per_thread = 1;
876	            MACRO_ADD_BIAS_LN_ADD_RES(T_per_TVec);
877	        }
878	        else if (blockSize <= 2048) {
879	            const int TVec_per_thread = 2;
880	            MACRO_ADD_BIAS_LN_ADD_RES(T_per_TVec);
881	        }
882	        else if (blockSize <= 4096) {
883	            const int TVec_per_thread = 4;
884	            MACRO_ADD_BIAS_LN_ADD_RES(T_per_TVec);
885	        }
886	        else if (blockSize <= 8192) {
887	            const int TVec_per_thread = 8;
888	            MACRO_ADD_BIAS_LN_ADD_RES(T_per_TVec);
889	        }
890	        else if (blockSize <= 16384) {
891	            const int TVec_per_thread = 16;
892	            MACRO_ADD_BIAS_LN_ADD_RES(T_per_TVec);
893	        }
894	        else {
895	            FT_CHECK_WITH_INFO(false, "[invokeAddBiasLayernormAddRes] unsupported dataType.");
896	        }
897	    }
898	    else {
899	        const int T_per_TVec = 1;
900	        int       blockSize  = (n + 31) / 32 * 32;
901	        if (blockSize <= 1024) {
902	            const int TVec_per_thread = 1;
903	            MACRO_ADD_BIAS_LN_ADD_RES(T_per_TVec);
904	        }
905	        else if (blockSize <= 2048) {
906	            const int TVec_per_thread = 2;
907	            MACRO_ADD_BIAS_LN_ADD_RES(T_per_TVec);
908	        }
909	        else if (blockSize <= 4096) {
910	            const int TVec_per_thread = 4;
911	            MACRO_ADD_BIAS_LN_ADD_RES(T_per_TVec);
912	        }
913	        else if (blockSize <= 8192) {
914	            const int TVec_per_thread = 8;
915	            MACRO_ADD_BIAS_LN_ADD_RES(T_per_TVec);
916	        }
917	        else if (blockSize <= 16384) {
918	            const int TVec_per_thread = 16;
919	            MACRO_ADD_BIAS_LN_ADD_RES(T_per_TVec);
920	        }
921	        else if (blockSize <= 32768) {
922	            const int TVec_per_thread = 32;
923	            MACRO_ADD_BIAS_LN_ADD_RES(T_per_TVec);
924	        }
925	        else {
926	            FT_CHECK_WITH_INFO(false, "[invokeAddBiasLayernormAddRes] unsupported dataType.");
927	        }
928	    }
929	}

931	template void invokeAddBiasLayernormAddResCol32(int8_t*      out_int8,
932	                                                int8_t*      out,

937	                                                const float  layernorm_eps,

941	                                                const float* input_deQFactor_ptr,

944	template void invokeAddBiasLayernormAddResCol32(int8_t*      out_int8,
945	                                                int8_t*      out,
946	                                                half*        residual_input,
947	                                                const half*  bias,
948	                                                const half*  gamma,
949	                                                const half*  beta,
950	                                                const float  layernorm_eps,
951	                                                int          m,

956	
957	/*******************  invokeGeneralAddBiasResidualPreLayerNormCol32  ***********************/
958	
959	// each warp process 1 row, and increase the num of warps per block to increase occupancy
960	template<int WPB, int VPT, bool WRITE_RESIDUAL, bool IS_BIAS, bool IS_INPUT>
961	__global__ void add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int8IO_warpReduce(int8_t*       output,
962	                                                                 int8_t*       input1,
963	                                                                 __half*       residual,
964	                                                                 const __half* bias,
965	                                                                 const __half* gamma,
966	                                                                 const __half* beta,
967	                                                                 int           m,
968	                                                                 const int     n,
969	                                                                 const float   dqScaleIn,
970	                                                                 const float   qScale)
971	{
972	    const int lane_id   = threadIdx.x % 32;
973	    const int warp_id   = threadIdx.x / 32;
974	    const int col_start = lane_id * VPT;
975	    const int row_id    = blockIdx.x * WPB + warp_id;
976	
977	    const int idx = (col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (row_id << 5) + (col_start & 31);
978	
979	    if (row_id >= m || col_start >= n)
980	        return;
981	
982	    int8_t in_local[VPT];
983	
984	    __half in_local_dq[VPT];
985	    __half bias_local[VPT];
986	    __half gamma_local[VPT];
987	    copy<sizeof(__half) * VPT>(&residual[idx], in_local_dq);
988	    if (IS_INPUT) {
989	        copy<sizeof(int8_t) * VPT>(&input1[idx], in_local);
990	    }
991	    if (IS_BIAS) {
992	        copy<sizeof(__half) * VPT>(&bias[col_start], bias_local);
993	    }
994	
995	    float local_sum = 0.0f;
996	#pragma unroll
997	    for (int it = 0; it < VPT; it++) {
998	        // DQ input
999	        if (IS_INPUT) {
1000	            in_local_dq[it] += dqScaleIn * in_local[it];
1001	        }
1002	        if (IS_BIAS) {
1003	            in_local_dq[it] += bias_local[it];
1004	        }
1005	        local_sum += (float)in_local_dq[it];
1006	    }
1007	    // load parameters
1008	    copy<sizeof(__half) * VPT>(&beta[col_start], bias_local);
1009	    copy<sizeof(__half) * VPT>(&gamma[col_start], gamma_local);
1010	
1011	    __shared__ float mu[WPB];      // mean
1012	    __shared__ float rsigma[WPB];  // 1 / std.dev.
1013	
1014	    local_sum = warpReduceSum<float>(local_sum);
1015	
1016	    if (lane_id == 0) {
1017	        mu[warp_id] = local_sum * __fdividef(1.0f, n);
1018	    }
1019	    __syncthreads();
1020	
1021	    local_sum = 0.0f;
1022	#pragma unroll
1023	    for (int it = 0; it < VPT; it++) {
1024	        local_sum += ((float)in_local_dq[it] - mu[warp_id]) * ((float)in_local_dq[it] - mu[warp_id]);
1025	    }
1026	    local_sum = warpReduceSum<float>(local_sum);
1027	    if (lane_id == 0) {
1028	        rsigma[warp_id] = rsqrtf(local_sum * __fdividef(1.0f, n) + 1e-5);
1029	    }
1030	    __syncthreads();
1031	    static_assert(VPT % 4 == 0, "");
1032	    uint32_t out_local[VPT / 4];
1033	#pragma unroll
1034	    for (int it = 0; it < VPT / 4; it++) {
1035	        const float tmp0 =
1036	            (float)gamma_local[it * 4 + 0] * ((float)in_local_dq[it * 4 + 0] - mu[warp_id]) * rsigma[warp_id]
1037	            + (float)bias_local[it * 4 + 0];
1038	        const float tmp1 =
1039	            (float)gamma_local[it * 4 + 1] * ((float)in_local_dq[it * 4 + 1] - mu[warp_id]) * rsigma[warp_id]
1040	            + (float)bias_local[it * 4 + 1];
1041	        const float tmp2 =
1042	            (float)gamma_local[it * 4 + 2] * ((float)in_local_dq[it * 4 + 2] - mu[warp_id]) * rsigma[warp_id]
1043	            + (float)bias_local[it * 4 + 2];
1044	        const float tmp3 =
1045	            (float)gamma_local[it * 4 + 3] * ((float)in_local_dq[it * 4 + 3] - mu[warp_id]) * rsigma[warp_id]
1046	            + (float)bias_local[it * 4 + 3];
1047	        out_local[it] = float4_to_char4(tmp0 * qScale, tmp1 * qScale, tmp2 * qScale, tmp3 * qScale);
1048	    }
1049	
1050	    copy<sizeof(int8_t) * VPT>(out_local, &output[idx]);
1051	    if (WRITE_RESIDUAL)
1052	        copy<sizeof(__half) * VPT>(in_local_dq, &residual[idx]);
1053	}
1054	
1055	template<int VPT, bool WRITE_RESIDUAL, bool IS_BIAS, bool IS_INPUT>
1056	__global__ void add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int8IO(int8_t*       output,
1057	                                                      int8_t*       input1,
1058	                                                      __half*       residual,
1059	                                                      const __half* bias,
1060	                                                      const __half* gamma,
1061	                                                      const __half* beta,
1062	                                                      int           m,
1063	                                                      const int     n,
1064	                                                      const float   dqScaleIn,
1065	                                                      const float   qScale)
1066	{
1067	    // compute idx based on COL32
1068	    // [m,n]-COL32 (blockIdx.x, threadIdx.x * VPT)
1069	    const int col_start = threadIdx.x * VPT;
1070	    const int idx       = (col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_start & 31);
1071	
1072	    int8_t in_local[VPT];
1073	
1074	    __half in_local_dq[VPT];
1075	    __half bias_local[VPT];
1076	    __half gamma_local[VPT];
1077	    copy<sizeof(__half) * VPT>(&residual[idx], in_local_dq);
1078	    if (IS_INPUT) {
1079	        copy<sizeof(int8_t) * VPT>(&input1[idx], in_local);
1080	    }
1081	    if (IS_BIAS) {
1082	        copy<sizeof(__half) * VPT>(&bias[col_start], bias_local);
1083	    }
1084	
1085	    float local_sum = 0.0f;
1086	#pragma unroll
1087	    for (int it = 0; it < VPT; it++) {
1088	        // DQ input
1089	        if (IS_INPUT) {
1090	            in_local_dq[it] += dqScaleIn * in_local[it];
1091	        }
1092	        if (IS_BIAS) {
1093	            in_local_dq[it] += bias_local[it];
1094	        }
1095	        local_sum += (float)in_local_dq[it];
1096	    }
1097	    // load parameters
1098	    copy<sizeof(__half) * VPT>(&beta[col_start], bias_local);
1099	    copy<sizeof(__half) * VPT>(&gamma[col_start], gamma_local);
1100	
1101	    __shared__ float mu;      // mean
1102	    __shared__ float rsigma;  // 1 / std.dev.
1103	
1104	    local_sum = blockReduceSum<float>(local_sum);
1105	
1106	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
1107	        mu = local_sum * __fdividef(1.0f, n);
1108	    }
1109	    __syncthreads();
1110	
1111	    local_sum = 0.0f;
1112	#pragma unroll
1113	    for (int it = 0; it < VPT; it++) {
1114	        local_sum += ((float)in_local_dq[it] - mu) * ((float)in_local_dq[it] - mu);
1115	    }
1116	    local_sum = blockReduceSum<float>(local_sum);
1117	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
1118	        rsigma = rsqrtf(local_sum * __fdividef(1.0f, n) + 1e-5);
1119	    }
1120	    __syncthreads();
1121	
1122	    static_assert(VPT % 4 == 0, "");
1123	    uint32_t out_local[VPT / 4];
1124	#pragma unroll
1125	    for (int it = 0; it < VPT / 4; it++) {
1126	        const float tmp0 = (float)gamma_local[it * 4 + 0] * ((float)in_local_dq[it * 4 + 0] - mu) * rsigma
1127	                           + (float)bias_local[it * 4 + 0];
1128	        const float tmp1 = (float)gamma_local[it * 4 + 1] * ((float)in_local_dq[it * 4 + 1] - mu) * rsigma
1129	                           + (float)bias_local[it * 4 + 1];
1130	        const float tmp2 = (float)gamma_local[it * 4 + 2] * ((float)in_local_dq[it * 4 + 2] - mu) * rsigma
1131	                           + (float)bias_local[it * 4 + 2];
1132	        const float tmp3 = (float)gamma_local[it * 4 + 3] * ((float)in_local_dq[it * 4 + 3] - mu) * rsigma
1133	                           + (float)bias_local[it * 4 + 3];
1134	        out_local[it] = float4_to_char4(tmp0 * qScale, tmp1 * qScale, tmp2 * qScale, tmp3 * qScale);
1135	    }
1136	
1137	    copy<sizeof(int8_t) * VPT>(out_local, &output[idx]);
1138	    if (WRITE_RESIDUAL)
1139	        copy<sizeof(__half) * VPT>(in_local_dq, &residual[idx]);
1140	}
1141	
1142	void invokeAddBiasResidualPreLayerNormCol32(int8_t*       output,
1143	                                            int8_t*       input1,
1144	                                            __half*       input2,
1145	                                            const __half* bias,
1146	                                            const __half* gamma,
1147	                                            const __half* beta,
1148	                                            int           m,
1149	                                            const int     n,
1150	                                            cudaStream_t  stream,
1151	                                            const float   dqScaleIn,
1152	                                            const float   qScale)
1153	{
1154	    dim3          grid(m);
1155	    constexpr int VPT = 16 / sizeof(__half);
1156	    if (n <= VPT * 32 && n % VPT == 0) {
1157	        constexpr int TPB  = 1024 / VPT;
1158	        constexpr int WPB  = (TPB + 31) / 32;
1159	        int           grid = m / WPB;
1160	        add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int8IO_warpReduce<WPB, VPT, true, true, true>
1161	            <<<grid, TPB, 0, stream>>>(output, input1, input2, bias, gamma, beta, m, n, dqScaleIn, qScale);
1162	    }
1163	    else if (n / VPT <= 1024 && n % VPT == 0) {
1164	        const int blockSize = n / VPT;
1165	        add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int8IO<VPT, true, true, true>
1166	            <<<grid, blockSize, 0, stream>>>(output, input1, input2, bias, gamma, beta, m, n, dqScaleIn, qScale);
1167	    }
1168	    else {
1169	        printf("[FT ERROR]Unsupported dimension n=%d for layernorm, because n / 8 > 1024 || n %% 8 != 0. \n", n);
1170	        exit(0);
1171	    }
1172	}
1173	
1174	// input1/input2/out matrix with layout of cublasLt CUBLASLT_ORDER_COL32 (m*n)
1175	//(grid, block) must be (m, n/4)
1176	// using char4
1177	template<typename T>
1178	__global__ void add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int8IO_noRes(int8_t*      output,
1179	                                                            int32_t*     input1,
1180	                                                            T*           input2,
1181	                                                            const T*     bias,
1182	                                                            const T*     gamma,
1183	                                                            const T*     beta,
1184	                                                            int          m,
1185	                                                            int          n,
1186	                                                            const float* weight_amax,
1187	                                                            const float* input1_amax_ptr,
1188	                                                            const float* output_scale_ptr)
1189	{
1190	    const float input1_amax  = __ldg(input1_amax_ptr);
1191	    const float output_scale = __ldg(output_scale_ptr);
1192	    int         col_start    = threadIdx.x << 2;
1193	    bool        qual         = (col_start < n);
1194	
1195	    __shared__ float s_mean;
1196	    __shared__ float s_variance;
1197	    float            mean     = 0.0f;
1198	    float            variance = 0.0f;
1199	
1200	    float local_out[4];
1201	    int   outIdx       = ((col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_start & 31)) >> 2;
1202	    int4* input1TmpPtr = (int4*)input1;
1203	    int4  input1Tmp;
1204	    if (qual) {
1205	        input1Tmp         = __ldg(input1TmpPtr + outIdx);
1206	        int col_start_tmp = col_start;
1207	        // NOTE: 0.000062f = 1 / 127/.0f / 127.0f
1208	        local_out[0] = static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.x) * input1_amax * weight_amax[col_start_tmp] * 0.000062f
1209	                       + static_cast<float>(input2[(outIdx << 2) + 0]) + static_cast<float>(bias[col_start_tmp]);
1210	        input2[(outIdx << 2) + 0] = local_out[0];
1211	
1212	        col_start_tmp = col_start_tmp + 1;
1213	        local_out[1]  = static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.y) * input1_amax * weight_amax[col_start_tmp] * 0.000062f
1214	                       + static_cast<float>(input2[(outIdx << 2) + 1]) + static_cast<float>(bias[col_start_tmp]);
1215	        input2[(outIdx << 2) + 1] = local_out[1];
1216	
1217	        col_start_tmp = col_start_tmp + 1;
1218	        local_out[2]  = static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.z) * input1_amax * weight_amax[col_start_tmp] * 0.000062f
1219	                       + static_cast<float>(input2[(outIdx << 2) + 2]) + static_cast<float>(bias[col_start_tmp]);
1220	        input2[(outIdx << 2) + 2] = local_out[2];
1221	
1222	        col_start_tmp = col_start_tmp + 1;
1223	        local_out[3]  = static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.w) * input1_amax * weight_amax[col_start_tmp] * 0.000062f
1224	                       + static_cast<float>(input2[(outIdx << 2) + 3]) + static_cast<float>(bias[col_start_tmp]);
1225	        input2[(outIdx << 2) + 3] = local_out[3];
1226	    }
1227	
1228	    mean = blockReduceSum<float>(qual ? local_out[0] + local_out[1] + local_out[2] + local_out[3] : 0.0f);
1229	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
1230	        s_mean = mean * __fdividef(1.0f, n);
1231	    }
1232	    __syncthreads();
1233	
1234	    if (qual) {
1235	        local_out[0] = local_out[0] - s_mean;
1236	        local_out[1] = local_out[1] - s_mean;
1237	        local_out[2] = local_out[2] - s_mean;
1238	        local_out[3] = local_out[3] - s_mean;
1239	    }
1240	    variance = blockReduceSum<float>(qual ? local_out[0] * local_out[0] + local_out[1] * local_out[1]
1241	                                                + local_out[2] * local_out[2] + local_out[3] * local_out[3] :
1242	                                            0.0f);
1243	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
1244	        s_variance = variance * __fdividef(1.0f, n) + 1e-6f;
1245	        s_variance = rsqrtf(s_variance);
1246	    }
1247	    __syncthreads();
1248	
1249	    char4* outputTmpPtr = (char4*)output;
1250	    char4  outputTmp;
1251	    if (qual) {
1252	        local_out[0] = (local_out[0] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
1253	                       + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
1254	        outputTmp.x = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[0] * output_scale);
1255	
1256	        col_start    = col_start + 1;
1257	        local_out[1] = (local_out[1] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
1258	                       + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
1259	        outputTmp.y = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[1] * output_scale);
1260	
1261	        col_start    = col_start + 1;
1262	        local_out[2] = (local_out[2] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
1263	                       + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
1264	        outputTmp.z = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[2] * output_scale);
1265	
1266	        col_start    = col_start + 1;
1267	        local_out[3] = (local_out[3] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
1268	                       + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
1269	        outputTmp.w = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[3] * output_scale);
1270	
1271	        outputTmpPtr[outIdx] = outputTmp;
1272	    }
1273	}
1274	
1275	template<>
1276	__global__ void add_bias_input_layernorm_COL32_int8IO_noRes(int8_t*      output,
1277	                                                            int32_t*     input1,
1278	                                                            half2*       input2,
1279	                                                            const half2* bias,
1280	                                                            const half2* gamma,
1281	                                                            const half2* beta,
1282	                                                            int          m,
1283	                                                            int          n,
1284	                                                            const float* weight_amax,
1285	                                                            const float* input1_amax_ptr,
1286	                                                            const float* output_scale_ptr)
1287	{
1288	    const float2* weight_scale_ptr = (const float2*)weight_amax;
1289	    const float   input1_amax      = __ldg(input1_amax_ptr);
1290	    const float   output_scale     = __ldg(output_scale_ptr);
1291	    int           col_start        = threadIdx.x << 1;
1292	    bool          qual             = (col_start < n);
1293	
1294	    __shared__ float s_mean;
1295	    __shared__ float s_variance;
1296	    float            sums[2] = {0.0f, 0.0f};
1297	    // float mean = 0.0f;
1298	    // float variance = 0.0f;
1299	
1300	    float local_out[2];
1301	    int   outIdx       = ((col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_start & 31)) >> 1;
1302	    int2* input1TmpPtr = (int2*)input1;
1303	    int2  input1Tmp;
1304	    if (qual) {
1305	        const float2 weight_scale = __ldg(weight_scale_ptr + threadIdx.x);
1306	        input1Tmp                 = input1TmpPtr[outIdx];
1307	        half2 biasTmp             = bias[threadIdx.x];
1308	        half2 input2Tmp           = input2[outIdx];
1309	        // NOTE: 0.000062f = 1 / 127/.0f / 127.0f
1310	        local_out[0] =
1311	            static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.x) * input1_amax * weight_scale.x * 0.000062f + static_cast<float>(biasTmp.x);
1312	        local_out[1] =
1313	            static_cast<float>(input1Tmp.y) * input1_amax * weight_scale.y * 0.000062f + static_cast<float>(biasTmp.y);
1314	
1315	        local_out[0] += static_cast<float>(input2Tmp.x);
1316	        local_out[1] += static_cast<float>(input2Tmp.y);
1317	
1318	        input2Tmp.x    = local_out[0];
1319	        input2Tmp.y    = local_out[1];
1320	        input2[outIdx] = input2Tmp;
1321	        for (int i = 0; i < 2; i++) {
1322	            sums[0] += local_out[i];
1323	            sums[1] += local_out[i] * local_out[i];
1324	        }
1325	    }
1326	
1327	    blockReduceSumV2<float, 2>(sums);
1328	
1329	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
1330	        s_mean     = sums[0] * __fdividef(1.0f, n);
1331	        s_variance = rsqrtf(sums[1] * __fdividef(1.0f, n) - s_mean * s_mean + 1e-6);
1332	    }
1333	    __syncthreads();
1334	
1335	    char2* outputTmpPtr = (char2*)output;
1336	    char2  outputTmp;
1337	    if (qual) {
1338	        half2 gammaTmp = gamma[threadIdx.x];
1339	        half2 betaTmp  = beta[threadIdx.x];
1340	        local_out[0] =
1341	            (local_out[0] - s_mean) * s_variance * static_cast<float>(gammaTmp.x) + static_cast<float>(betaTmp.x);
1342	        outputTmp.x = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[0] * output_scale);
1343	
1344	        local_out[1] =
1345	            (local_out[1] - s_mean) * s_variance * static_cast<float>(gammaTmp.y) + static_cast<float>(betaTmp.y);
1346	        outputTmp.y = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[1] * output_scale);
1347	
1348	        outputTmpPtr[outIdx] = outputTmp;
1349	    }
1350	}

1405	                                                     int32_t*     input1,
1406	                                                     half*        input2,
1407	                                                     const half*  bias,
1408	                                                     const half*  gamma,
1409	                                                     const half*  beta,
1410	                                                     int          m,
1411	                                                     int          n,
1412	                                                     cudaStream_t stream,

1414	                                                     const float* input1_amax_ptr,

1417	/*******************  invokeLayernormCol32  ***********************/
1418	
1419	// input1/input2/out matrix with layout of cublasLt CUBLASLT_ORDER_COL32 (m*n)
1420	//(grid, block) must be (m, n/4)
1421	// using char4
1422	template<typename T>
1423	__global__ void layernorm_COL32_DataTypeI_int8O(
1424	    int8_t* out, const T* input, const T* gamma, const T* beta, int m, int n, const float* output_scale_ptr)
1425	{
1426	    const float output_scale = __ldg(output_scale_ptr);
1427	    int         col_start    = threadIdx.x << 2;
1428	    bool        qual         = (col_start < n);
1429	
1430	    __shared__ float s_mean;
1431	    __shared__ float s_variance;
1432	    float            mean     = 0.0f;
1433	    float            variance = 0.0f;
1434	
1435	    float local_out[4];
1436	    int   outIdx = ((col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_start & 31)) >> 2;
1437	
1438	    if (qual) {
1439	        local_out[0] = static_cast<float>(input[(outIdx << 2) + 0]);
1440	        local_out[1] = static_cast<float>(input[(outIdx << 2) + 1]);
1441	        local_out[2] = static_cast<float>(input[(outIdx << 2) + 2]);
1442	        local_out[3] = static_cast<float>(input[(outIdx << 2) + 3]);
1443	    }
1444	
1445	    mean = blockReduceSum<float>(qual ? local_out[0] + local_out[1] + local_out[2] + local_out[3] : 0.0f);
1446	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
1447	        s_mean = mean * __fdividef(1.0f, n);
1448	    }
1449	    __syncthreads();
1450	
1451	    if (qual) {
1452	        local_out[0] = local_out[0] - s_mean;
1453	        local_out[1] = local_out[1] - s_mean;
1454	        local_out[2] = local_out[2] - s_mean;
1455	        local_out[3] = local_out[3] - s_mean;
1456	    }
1457	    variance = blockReduceSum<float>(qual ? local_out[0] * local_out[0] + local_out[1] * local_out[1]
1458	                                                + local_out[2] * local_out[2] + local_out[3] * local_out[3] :
1459	                                            0.0f);
1460	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
1461	        s_variance = variance * __fdividef(1.0f, n) + 1e-6f;
1462	        s_variance = rsqrtf(s_variance);
1463	    }
1464	    __syncthreads();
1465	
1466	    char4  outTmp;
1467	    char4* outPtr = (char4*)out;
1468	    if (qual) {
1469	        local_out[0] = (local_out[0] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
1470	                       + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
1471	        outTmp.x = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[0] * output_scale);
1472	
1473	        col_start    = col_start + 1;
1474	        local_out[1] = (local_out[1] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
1475	                       + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
1476	        outTmp.y = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[1] * output_scale);
1477	
1478	        col_start    = col_start + 1;
1479	        local_out[2] = (local_out[2] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
1480	                       + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
1481	        outTmp.z = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[2] * output_scale);
1482	
1483	        col_start    = col_start + 1;
1484	        local_out[3] = (local_out[3] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
1485	                       + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
1486	        outTmp.w = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[3] * output_scale);
1487	
1488	        outPtr[outIdx] = outTmp;
1489	    }
1490	}

1492	template<>
1493	__global__ void layernorm_COL32_DataTypeI_int8O(
1494	    int8_t* out, const half2* input, const half2* gamma, const half2* beta, int m, int n, const float* output_scale_ptr)
1495	{
1496	    const float output_scale = __ldg(output_scale_ptr);
1497	    int         col_start    = threadIdx.x << 1;
1498	    bool        qual         = (col_start < n);
1499	
1500	    __shared__ float s_mean;
1501	    __shared__ float s_variance;
1502	    float            sums[2] = {0.0f, 0.0f};
1503	    // float mean = 0.0f;
1504	    // float variance = 0.0f;
1505	
1506	    float local_out[2];
1507	    int   outIdx = ((col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_start & 31)) >> 1;
1508	
1509	    if (qual) {
1510	        half2 inputTmp = input[outIdx];
1511	        local_out[0]   = static_cast<float>(inputTmp.x);
1512	        local_out[1]   = static_cast<float>(inputTmp.y);
1513	
1514	        for (int i = 0; i < 2; i++) {
1515	            sums[0] += local_out[i];
1516	            sums[1] += local_out[i] * local_out[i];
1517	        }
1518	    }
1519	
1520	    blockReduceSumV2<float, 2>(sums);
1521	
1522	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
1523	        s_mean     = sums[0] * __fdividef(1.0f, n);
1524	        s_variance = rsqrtf(sums[1] * __fdividef(1.0f, n) - s_mean * s_mean + 1e-6);
1525	    }
1526	    __syncthreads();
1527	
1528	    char2  outTmp;
1529	    char2* outPtr = (char2*)out;
1530	    if (qual) {
1531	        half2 gammaTmp = gamma[threadIdx.x];
1532	        half2 betaTmp  = beta[threadIdx.x];
1533	        local_out[0] =
1534	            (local_out[0] - s_mean) * s_variance * static_cast<float>(gammaTmp.x) + static_cast<float>(betaTmp.x);
1535	        outTmp.x = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[0] * output_scale);
1536	
1537	        local_out[1] =
1538	            (local_out[1] - s_mean) * s_variance * static_cast<float>(gammaTmp.y) + static_cast<float>(betaTmp.y);
1539	        outTmp.y = float_to_int8_rn(local_out[1] * output_scale);
1540	
1541	        outPtr[outIdx] = outTmp;
1542	    }
1543	}

1595	    T* out, const int8_t* input, const T* gamma, const T* beta, int m, int n, const float* input_deQ_ptr)
1596	{
1597	    const float input_deQ = __ldg(input_deQ_ptr);
1598	    int         col_start = threadIdx.x << 2;
1599	    bool        qual      = (col_start < n);
1600	
1601	    __shared__ float s_mean;

1603	    float            mean     = 0.0f;

1608	
1609	    char4* inputPtr = (char4*)input;
1610	    if (qual) {
1611	        char4 inputTmp = inputPtr[outIdx];
1612	        local_out[0]   = static_cast<float>(inputTmp.x) * input_deQ;
1613	        local_out[1]   = static_cast<float>(inputTmp.y) * input_deQ;
1614	        local_out[2]   = static_cast<float>(inputTmp.z) * input_deQ;
1615	        local_out[3]   = static_cast<float>(inputTmp.w) * input_deQ;
1616	    }
1617	
1618	    mean = blockReduceSum<float>(qual ? local_out[0] + local_out[1] + local_out[2] + local_out[3] : 0.0f);
1619	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
1620	        s_mean = mean * __fdividef(1.0f, n);
1621	    }
1622	    __syncthreads();
1623	
1624	    if (qual) {
1625	        local_out[0] = local_out[0] - s_mean;
1626	        local_out[1] = local_out[1] - s_mean;
1627	        local_out[2] = local_out[2] - s_mean;
1628	        local_out[3] = local_out[3] - s_mean;
1629	    }
1630	    variance = blockReduceSum<float>(qual ? local_out[0] * local_out[0] + local_out[1] * local_out[1]
1631	                                                + local_out[2] * local_out[2] + local_out[3] * local_out[3] :
1632	                                            0.0f);
1633	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
1634	        s_variance = variance * __fdividef(1.0f, n) + 1e-6f;
1635	        s_variance = rsqrtf(s_variance);
1636	    }
1637	    __syncthreads();
1638	
1639	    float4  outTmp;
1640	    float4* outPtr = (float4*)out;
1641	    if (qual) {
1642	        local_out[0] = (local_out[0] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
1643	                       + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
1644	        outTmp.x = local_out[0];
1645	
1646	        col_start    = col_start + 1;
1647	        local_out[1] = (local_out[1] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
1648	                       + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
1649	        outTmp.y = local_out[1];
1650	
1651	        col_start    = col_start + 1;
1652	        local_out[2] = (local_out[2] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
1653	                       + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
1654	        outTmp.z = local_out[2];
1655	
1656	        col_start    = col_start + 1;
1657	        local_out[3] = (local_out[3] * s_variance) * static_cast<float>(__ldg(gamma + col_start))
1658	                       + static_cast<float>(__ldg(beta + col_start));
1659	        outTmp.w = local_out[3];
1660	
1661	        outPtr[outIdx] = outTmp;
1662	    }

1665	template<>

1667	    half2* out, const int8_t* input, const half2* gamma, const half2* beta, int m, int n, const float* input_deQ_ptr)
1668	{
1669	    const float input_deQ = __ldg(input_deQ_ptr);
1670	
1671	    __shared__ float s_mean;
1672	    __shared__ float s_variance;
1673	    float            sums[2] = {0.0f, 0.0f};
1674	
1675	#pragma unroll
1676	    for (int i = threadIdx.x; i < n / 2; i += blockDim.x) {
1677	        int    col_start = i << 1;
1678	        float  local_out[2];
1679	        int    outIdx   = ((col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_start & 31)) >> 1;
1680	        char2* inputPtr = (char2*)input;
1681	        char2  inputTmp = inputPtr[outIdx];
1682	        local_out[0]    = static_cast<float>(inputTmp.x) * input_deQ;
1683	        local_out[1]    = static_cast<float>(inputTmp.y) * input_deQ;
1684	
1685	        for (int i = 0; i < 2; i++) {
1686	            sums[0] += local_out[i];
1687	            sums[1] += local_out[i] * local_out[i];
1688	        }
1689	    }
1690	
1691	    blockReduceSumV2<float, 2>(sums);
1692	
1693	    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
1694	        s_mean     = sums[0] * __fdividef(1.0f, n);
1695	        s_variance = rsqrtf(sums[1] * __fdividef(1.0f, n) - s_mean * s_mean + 1e-6);
1696	    }
1697	    __syncthreads();
1698	
1699	    float2 outTmp;
1700	
1701	#pragma unroll
1702	    for (int i = threadIdx.x; i < n / 2; i += blockDim.x) {
1703	        int    col_start = i << 1;
1704	        float  local_out[2];
1705	        int    outIdx   = ((col_start & 0xffffffe0) * m + (blockIdx.x << 5) + (col_start & 31)) >> 1;
1706	        char2* inputPtr = (char2*)input;
1707	        char2  inputTmp = inputPtr[outIdx];
1708	        local_out[0]    = static_cast<float>(inputTmp.x) * input_deQ;
1709	        local_out[1]    = static_cast<float>(inputTmp.y) * input_deQ;
1710	
1711	        half2 gammaTmp = gamma[i];
1712	        half2 betaTmp  = beta[i];
1713	        outTmp.x =
1714	            (local_out[0] - s_mean) * s_variance * static_cast<float>(gammaTmp.x) + static_cast<float>(betaTmp.x);
1715	        outTmp.y =
1716	            (local_out[1] - s_mean) * s_variance * static_cast<float>(gammaTmp.y) + static_cast<float>(betaTmp.y);
1717	
1718	        out[outIdx] = __float22half2_rn(outTmp);
1719	    }
